channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mike Sonko's Extravagant Airport Farewell for Daughter Sandra
item.description: Former Nairobi Governor Mike Sonko and his family recently caused a buzz online after a video surfaced showcasing their elaborate send-off for his daughter, Sandra Mbuvi, as she returns to the Univers...

item.title: Seven Rajya Sabha MPs Leave AAP to Join BJP, Spark Political Crisis

item.title: Jake Reiner Shares Grief Over Loss of Parents, Film Producers Rob and Michele Reiner
item.description: Actor Jake Reiner is publicly sharing his profound grief and pain following the passing of his parents, celebrated film producers Rob and Michele Reiner. The couple were best known for their work on a...

item.title: UK considers potential policy shift on returning refused Afghan asylum seekers amid European talks
item.description: The UK home secretary, Shabana Mahmood, has indicated that the government is considering the possibility of returning rejected Afghan asylum seekers to Afghanistan, although no final decision has been...

item.title: Sandy Brondello Takes on Major Challenge as Head Coach of Toronto Tempo

item.title: Family of Murder Suspect Visits Benter Apondi’s Home as Investigations Continue

item.title: Baroka's battle for survival hinges on four crucial matches
item.description: With just four matches left in the Motsepe Foundation Championship and Baroka sitting at the bottom of the table with only 19 points, the club faces a tough battle to stay in the league. Coach Tlisane...

item.title: Projected Impacts of El Niño on Global Weather for 2026-2027
item.description: Weather forecasters worldwide are predicting a strong El Niño to develop in the latter half of 2026, with significant effects on global climate patterns. In Asia, countries like Japan, India, China, a...

item.title: Nick Cannon's Family: A Look at His Children and Baby Mamas

item.title: Online Reactions Follow Gaucho’s Visit to Mama Lucy Hospital After Board Appointment

item.title: Barangay Ginebra defeats Blackwater to secure fourth straight win in PBA
item.description: Barangay Ginebra San Miguel continued its strong showing in the PBA by defeating Blackwater Bossing and extending its winning streak to four games. The matchup featured a competitive back-and-forth ba...

item.title: Alberta Highway Closure Leaves Motorists Stranded for Over 15 Hours Amidst Severe Winter Storm
item.description: A severe winter storm has brought heavy snow and high winds to Alberta, leaving numerous motorists stranded on Highway 63 south of Fort McMurray for more than 15 hours. The storm, which began Thursday...

item.title: Hyundai targets major expansion in China with 20 new models over five years
item.description: Hyundai has announced an ambitious plan to introduce 20 new models in China over the next five years, aiming to strengthen its position in the world’s largest automotive market. The South Korean manuf...

item.title: Brisk Voting and Long Queues Mark Central Chennai in Tamil Nadu Assembly Elections 2026

item.title: Public safety expert advises peaceful surrender for accused killer Kyaw Doe

item.title: US Justice Department Drops Investigation Into Fed Chair Powell, Clearing Way for Warsh Confirmation
item.description: Di US Justice Department don announce say dem don stop di criminal investigation wey dey involve Federal Reserve Chair, Jerome Powell. Di probe dey wey fit hold up Senate confirmation for Trump pick, ...
